title: The Scholar's Gambit
description: The golem has been tested with 2 ingredients. Deduce the reaction pattern and identify the target group.

hints.text:
The golem reacts to SIZE on a specific color channel.
Known tests:
  ing5: chest=✓ ears=✓  →  animators
  ing6: chest=✗ ears=✓  →  ears_only
Chest reacts to G+L. Ears react to B+L. An animator needs BOTH. Cross-reference with untested ingredients.
The animators are: ingredients [5, 7]. Alch: ing5→NNN, ing7→PPP.
